failure_modes.text: Defensiveness can overwhelm the learning if the feedback lands as adversarial threat instead of as respectful correction.
failure_modes.mitigation: Frame feedback as a shared problem to solve rather than an adversarial judgment; respectful framing reduces defensiveness and protects the learning signal.

failure_modes.text: Micromanagement can keep the conversation stuck in the case-at-hand instead of improving the process that produced it.
failure_modes.mitigation: Elevate feedback from the specific case to the process that produced it; the goal is systemic improvement, not micromanagement of one incident.

failure_modes.text: Vague feedback can protect comfort but fail to give the receiver anything concrete enough to change.
failure_modes.mitigation: Make feedback concrete and behavioral: vague encouragement or criticism gives the receiver nothing specific enough to change.

premortem_questions.text: What would you have to believe?
premortem_questions.source_quote: What would you have to believe?

premortem_questions.text: If someone came to me asking my opinion about this kind of decision, what would I need to know to give good advice?
premortem_questions.source_quote: If someone came to me asking my opinion about this kind of decision, what would I need to know to give good advice?

premortem_questions.text: What process or machine condition produced this outcome, not just what happened in this one case?

heuristics.text: Use the 4 I's so feedback moves from concrete observation to impact, invitation, and implications instead of stalling at vague criticism.
Challenge directly while caring personally so the receiver gets both specificity and enough support to stay engaged.
Shift the discussion to the machine level when repetition suggests the system is producing the error, not just the person.

curation_notes.summary: The intervention layer stays on specific corrective delivery, invitation-based collaboration, and machine-level diagnosis.
donor_drops: Did not preserve broad coaching or review-process sprawl because the raw source is strongest on concrete feedback structures and anti-defensiveness tactics.
open_questions: The third premortem question is a reviewed operational compression of the machine-level discussion rule.

allies: The raw source is rich on metacognition, dialectic challenge, and Feynman-style blind-spot discovery.
antagonists: The source clearly names confirmation-bias, inside-view drift, and curse-of-knowledge pressure.
structured_tensions: No explicit structured tension block was preserved from the raw file.
